sections.heading: Example use only
paragraphs: This starter ships with placeholder terms so the site structure is complete, but the copy is not legal advice.
Before publishing, replace this example text with terms that match your services, jurisdiction, refund rules, and delivery process.

sections.heading: Scope of services
paragraphs: Use this section to describe what you offer, how engagements start, and what is outside your delivery scope.
If you sell products or services, define fulfillment expectations, payment rules, and cancellation terms clearly.
